'''baratha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycorrhization|mycorrhization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycorrhization|mycorrhization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| baratha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæræthæth|bæræthæth]] || [[word:bæræthæj|bæræthæj]] || [[word:bæræthæsh|bæræthæsh]] || [[word:bæræthæ|bæræthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bararathath|bararathath]] || [[word:bararathaj|bararathaj]] || [[word:bararathash|bararathash]] || [[word:bararatha|bararatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:barathath|barathath]] || [[word:barathaj|barathaj]] || [[word:barathash|barathash]] || [[word:baratha|baratha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:barafthath|barafthath]] || [[word:barafthaj|barafthaj]] || [[word:barafthash|barafthash]] || [[word:barafthaf|barafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:barathatha|barathatha]] || [[word:barathaja|barathaja]] || [[word:barathasha|barathasha]] || [[word:barathaka|barathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:barathath|barathath]] || [[word:barathaj|barathaj]] || [[word:barathash|barathash]] || [[word:baratha|baratha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:barathathal|barathathal]] || [[word:barathajal|barathajal]] || [[word:barathashal|barathashal]] || [[word:barathakal|barathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:barathathatha|barathathatha]] || [[word:barathajaja|barathajaja]] || [[word:barathashasha|barathashasha]] || [[word:barathaka|barathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:barathathan|barathathan]] || [[word:barathajan|barathajan]] || [[word:barathashan|barathashan]] || [[word:barathakan|barathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:barathathaoro|barathathaoro]] || [[word:barathajaoro|barathajaoro]] || [[word:barathashaoro|barathashaoro]] || [[word:barathakaoro|barathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
